ideal_must_detect.matched_text: This memo does not report a notifiable data breach; prior privacy incidents referenced in Risk Register RR-2025-07 are closed and require no further action.

must_detect.matched_text: This memo does not report a notifiable data breach; prior privacy incidents referenced in Risk Register RR-2025-07 are closed and require no further action.

To: Board Risk Committee; From: Ms. Eliza Hart, General Counsel; Contact: privacy@auroraforge.au, +61 2 3456 7890
Context: Aurora Forge is listed on the Harbour City Exchange (HCE) and subject to continuous disclosure under the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth).
We approved a limited cross-border transfer of onboarding forms to Cloud Kauri NZ Ltd (sub-processor to NimbusQuarry Pty Ltd) for payroll set-up; APP 8 safeguards recorded in DPA Schedule 2.
Data Export Committee approval DXP-2026-014 granted; fields exported limited to name, work email, start date, and Aurora Forge Employee Code (minimisation applied).
DPA Schedule 3 (Sub-processor and Overseas Recipient Register) was updated on 20 May 2026; no new transfers occur beyond New Zealand.
No government-issued identifiers or health records are included in this export; optional wellbeing disclosures on forms remain stored only in AU.
APP 12 access request (DSAR): Mr. Theo Quain sought access and correction to his employment file on 10 May; fulfilled on 15 May with identity verification and redactions of co-worker comments.
Consent withdrawal and erasure: Former contractor Dr. Sahana Rook opted out of talent-pool retention; CV and interview notes were erased on 12 May and a deletion certificate archived.
Retention: Recruitment data retention reduced from 24 to 12 months for unsuccessful candidates; legal hold AF-LH-22-09 was lifted on 1 May and the retention clock restarted accordingly.
Credit checks for finance roles continue under consent-based onboarding; no credit scores are exported outside Australia, and no adverse action was taken based on automated profiling.
MNPI controls: The export does not include budgets, forecasts, or unannounced board matters; information walls remain in place under HCE Listing Rules and insider trading provisions of the Corporations Act.
We confirm no generally unavailable information likely to affect the price of HCE-listed Aurora Forge securities was shared with vendors; vendor personnel are contractually restricted from dealing.
Health data: Workplace adjustment requests are processed locally via HR Service Desk; aggregate metrics only are shared with the Safety Committee, and no individual medical details are disclosed.
This memo does not report a notifiable data breach; prior privacy incidents referenced in Risk Register RR-2025-07 are closed and require no further action.
